div.head: The Secretary of State to the Minister in Estonia, Latvia, and Lithuania (Coleman)
div.p:
Sir: With reference to previous correspondence regarding the indebtedness of Latvia to the United States, you are informed that in a note dated June 26, 1925,Not printed. the Latvian Minister at Washington
informed the Department of his instructions to negotiate the debt funding agreement and stated that he desired to enter into immediate discussions with the World War Foreign Debt Commission. This information was communicated to the Secretary of the Treasury and on July 8, 1925, Mr. Seya was introduced to Mr. Winston, the Acting Secretary of the Treasury and the Secretary of the World War Foreign Debt Commission, with a view to the inauguration of the negotiations in question.For negotiations and text of agreement signed Sept. 24, 1925, see Combined Annual Reports of the World War Foreign Debt Commission, pp. 182–193.
div.closer:
For the Secretary of State:
J. Butler Wright
